judge_policy.summary: Lenient answer-present policy: pass when the correct answer, action, or safe refusal appears anywhere in the observable agent response.

scenarios.reason: Agent did not confirm the new Thursday 4 PM time.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi Aria, this is the patient with confirmation BSD1001. I’d like to reschedule my appointment to Thursday, June 4, 20

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure I can reschedule your appointment to Thursday. What time works best for you
